[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000100000 1
2 000000011 2
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 000000000 a

12 21 011000001 3
23 32 010000000 1
34 43 010100000 2

56 65 000000100 1

70 07 000000001 1
